description: A penetration tester is tasked with finding security flaws in a new REST API.

nodes.task_description: Use an API testing tool to enumerate all available API endpoints and parameters.

expected_outcome.value: Tester successfully maps out the API's attack surface.

nodes.task_description: Test for authentication and authorization flaws by attempting to access endpoints without proper credentials or as a different user.

expected_outcome.value: Tester discovers an endpoint that returns data belonging to another user, demonstrating a Broken Object Level Authorization (BOLA) flaw.

nodes.task_description: Document the vulnerability with a proof-of-concept exploit and report it to the development team.

expected_outcome.value: Tester provides a clear, actionable report that allows developers to fix the flaw.
